chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. D – 42 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 30.10.2024 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the Applicant Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional PG for the State along with Samiullah Soomro, SSP, Khairpur, SIP Ali Asghar, SHO, Insepctor Mukhtiar Ali SHO PS Sorah and PDSP Mir Muhammad >>>>>..<<<<< Pursuant to directions, SSP Khairpur / respondent No.4 has filed statement along with documents, which are taken on record, copy supplied to Counsel for the applicant. SSP Khairpur present in person submits that detenues, namely Imran and Syed Muqtadir Shah have reportedly been arrested in Crime Nos.199, 200 and 201 registered with Police Station, Faiz Ganj on 22.10.2024 for offences punishable under Sections 324, 353 PPC r/w Section 23(i)(a) of Sindh Arms Act, 2013; whereas, detenue Mir Muhammad has also been killed in an encounter in Crime No.135 of 2024 of Police Station, Baharo, while detenues Zamir and Bashir have already been arrested in injured condition after an encounter with police in Crime No.423 and 424 of 2024 of Police Station ‘B’ Section, Khairpur, hence the purpose of filing application in hand has been served and it may be disposed of. When confronted, Counsel for the applicant submits that though he has not been informed about such fact by the police or by his client and since statement has been filed by respondent No.4 today therefore, he too seeks disposal of the instant application. Accordingly, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application has served its purpose and therefore, is hereby disposed of.

When confronted, Counsel for the applicant submits that though he has not been informed about such fact by the police or by his client and since statement has been filed by respondent No.4 today therefore, he too seeks disposal of the instant application. Accordingly, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application has served its purpose and therefore, is hereby disposed of. Judge Judge ARBROHI
